_comment: Each server is optional — the plugin degrades gracefully if a server is unavailable.
Configure secrets via environment variables in your shell profile (.bashrc, .zshrc, etc.).
The GitHub MCP server (gh mcp-server) is typically built-in to Claude Code.
It is listed here for completeness and for environments where it is not auto-registered.
To verify which servers are active, run: scripts/check-prereqs.sh
